caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt, a black baseball cap, and over-ear headphones sits in a podcast studio. He wears a gold necklace and a watch on his left wrist. He is positioned behind a professional microphone. In the background, a wall features logos and text, including "GRIND AND HUSTLE" alongside stars and a sign that reads "BOSS TALK 101". On-screen graphics include a logo that says "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the man's expression remains thoughtful. He begins with his left hand near his chin, then brings his fingers up to touch his nose and mouth. By the final frames, he maintains this posture, resting his fingertips against his upper lip while gazing slightly off-camera. The background and equipment remain stationary while only the man's hand and facial movements change.
